items.name: Light pink
items.description:
Shirt!

🩰 Pastel pink shirt with a soft and clean design. Simple and stylish top that looks good on any avatar. Light pink color inspired by calm and gentle outfits. Perfect for everyday use, easy to match with pants or skirts. Great choice for soft and cute styles. Brings a calm and cozy vibe to your look. Smooth and minimal for those who like a soft pastel aesthetic. Perfect for spring, summer, or all-year looks. A favorite for simple and clean avatars.
